name: Tortilla Pinwheels
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften cream cheese.
2. Drain canned chili peppers.
3. Set out other ingredients.
4. In a bowl, combine cream cheese, milk, garlic powder, onion flakes, and salt.
5. Beat until fluffy.
6. Stir in chili peppers and cilantro leaves.
7. Brush both sides of a tortilla with water.
8. Spread a thin layer of the cream cheese mixture on one side of the tortilla.
9. Cover the other side of the tortilla with a layer of sliced turkey.
10. Roll up each tortilla tightly and place on a plate. Repeat with remaining tortillas.
11. Cover the plate with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 to 8 hours.
12. Cut into 1/2-inch slices and serve.
Pre-packaged "Buddig" style meats work well for everyday occasions.
Many supermarkets now carry small plastic containers of cilantro at one price. I've found that 1 container of cilantro (0.15 oz) is satisfactory for most occasions, even though less than 3 Tablespoons.
